text.title: Microservices Observability Examples
text.summary: Worked example: ship observability for order-service.

example.context: Spring Boot 3.4 service; existing Logback + JsonEncoder; needs OTel + Tempo + Grafana backend; SLO: 99.9% availability, p99 < 250ms.
example.walk: Step 1: install opentelemetry-javaagent + spring-boot-starter-actuator; OTLP_ENDPOINT=https://tempo.example.com:4317. Step 2: Logback layout adds %X{trace_id} %X{span_id}; OTel-Logback bridge injects MDC. Step 3: Actuator exposes /actuator/prometheus with http_server_requests_seconds histogram (5 buckets: 50/100/250/500/1000ms). Step 4: OTEL_PROPAGATORS=tracecontext,baggage; verify in Tempo that order-service trace continues into billing-service span. Step 5: OTel SpanProcessor redacts http.user.email; SLO file documents 0.1% error budget + alert on p99 > 250ms for 5min.
example.output: Operator can pick a trace in Tempo, jump to Loki logs filtered by trace_id, and see RED metrics in Grafana — all correlated.
